title: FriendTP
description: Tired of giving your friends OP just so they can teleport to you? FriendTP is the perfect solution!
body:
FriendTP - Teleport to Friends Without OP Permissions!
Tired of giving your friends OP just so they can teleport to you? FriendTP is the perfect solution!

FriendTP adds a simple, fair, and permission-less /tpa system to your Minecraft survival world. Now you and your friends can teleport to each other without worrying about accidental creative mode cheats or complicated server permissions.

✨ Features
No OP Required - Every player can use /tpa commands right away. No server permissions needed!

Request-Based System - Send a teleport request with /tpa <player>. Your friend accepts with /tpaccept - simple and polite!

Clickable Chat Buttons - When you receive a request, beautiful green [ACCEPT] and red [DENY] buttons appear in chat. Just click!

5-Second Countdown (Configurable) - After acceptance, wait a few seconds before teleporting. No more combat logging!

Smart Cancellation - Teleport cancels if you take damage (configurable). Fair play guaranteed!

/back Command - Changed your mind? Use /back to return to your previous location within 30 seconds (configurable timeout).

Request Cooldown - Prevents spam with configurable cooldown between requests.

Cross-Dimension Support - Teleport works across the Overworld, Nether, and End (configurable).

Visual & Audio Feedback - Screen countdown messages and sound notifications for requests.

🎮 Commands
Command	Description
/tpa <player>	Send a teleport request to a friend
/tpaccept	Accept the pending teleport request
/tpdeny	Deny the pending teleport request
/back	Return to your location before the last teleport
⚙️ Configurable Options
Everything is customizable in the config file!

Teleport delay (0-60 seconds)

Request cooldown (0-120 seconds)

Damage/movement cancellation

Cross-dimension toggle

Request timeout

/back command timeout

Sound and visual effects

🔧 For Modpack Developers
FriendTP is lightweight, has no dependencies, and is fully configurable. Perfect for any survival-focused modpack!

📥 Installation
Download the mod

Place it in your mods folder

Launch Minecraft

Start teleporting with friends!

Make survival multiplayer truly social - get FriendTP today!
